data.body: Bot-psychologist investigation: Hypothesis — Confidence Calibration Failure (#15). Step 3.5 gate checks verdict enum value but not evidentiary quality of the observed field. An agent can write reasoning-only confirmation into observed, set verdict: confirmed, and pass the gate. The gate checks schema shape, not that observed contains execution output. Fix: add 5th sub-check to Step 3.5 requiring observed field to reference command output or test result (not reasoning). Experiment needed to confirm (deferred — requires interactive session to run sycophancy probe).
